description_long: This kettle features a robust cylindrical body made primarily of dark metal, with a domed lid at the top and two vertical metallic posts flanking it. A prominent arched handle, likely made of metal, curves around the upper section, providing a secure grip. Copper-colored tubing wraps around the midsection, possibly for heating or decorative purposes, and a circular metallic band encircles the body. The base is supported by four sturdy, outward-angled legs with white, tubular feet, giving it a stable, elevated stance. The overall design is industrial and utilitarian, with no visible decorative patterns, and the spout is not clearly visible from any angle.
description: A dark, industrial-style kettle with a domed lid, arched handle, copper tubing, and four sturdy white legs. The design is robust and utilitarian, with metallic and copper accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid, arched handle, copper tubing, and all four white legs clearly.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the side-mounted posts, copper tubing, and the circular band around the body.
description_view_2: Rear view with the domed lid, copper tubing, and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs most visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the handle's curve, copper tubing, and the industrial structure of the base.
